description: Perfect separation — all events occur in one treatment arm (100% events in Experimental, 0 events in Control). This violates the proportional hazards assumption and may produce extreme or non-informative HR estimates.

sap_context.note: All 40 events are in the Experimental arm; Control has 0 events (all censored)

expected_output.expected_behavior: Should produce valid KM estimates per arm but flag non-PH concern
